data.name: 要不要和我女友開幹？
data.detailed_description:
▼即時性 自主NTR SLG

在注意時間流逝的同時（即使什麼都不做時間也會過去），

點擊畫面或指令，讓女友「變得想要（興奮）」的遊戲。

指令包括對話（下流梗）、灌醉、使用道具等等。

畫面中也有重要道具（陷阱），

只要掌握時機使用，就能對女友產生影響。

如果什麼都不做呆呆浪費時間，

女友可能會睡覺或直接回家，一下子就會Game Over了喔！

在天亮前讓女友變得想要，被朋友的肉棒一次又一次地插入吧！

▼故事

今晚，終於要讓「女友」被「朋友」上了……

有著NTR性癖的「秋歲」，

交往了一個性格古板的美術大學生女友「美夏」，

他無論如何都想看女友「被其他男人上的樣子」！

──他無法克制這種卑劣的慾望。

於是他向從小一起長大的朋友「春輝」商量，

春輝「好啦好啦。」

春輝「只要我跟美夏做就行了吧？」

秋歲「對，拜託了。」

春輝「認真的？真的要做？」

秋歲「我無論何時都是認真的。」

春輝「你……果然是瘋了……」

就這樣，這對笨蛋好友在三人共進晚餐後……使出各種花招！

為了讓女友「變得想要」而奮鬥。

登場角色

中潮 美夏

秋歲的女友，是個大學生。
與秋歲在大學認識（雙方都是第一次談戀愛）。
個性古板，是個循規蹈矩的普通女孩。
即使男友表明了自己的性癖（NTR），她也堅定拒絕。
不太喜歡男友的好友（春輝）那種輕浮的性格。

紅葉原 秋歲

美夏的男友。
就讀於同一所大學的大學生。
擁有獨特的感性，總是把女友耍得團團轉。
他向女友坦白自己的NTR性癖，但總是遭到拒絕。
然而，他還是無法死心，於是跟好友春輝商量。
兩人聯手，試圖讓美夏「變得想要」。

花園 春輝

秋歲從小一起長大的摯友。
在拉麵店打工，未來的目標是成為職業格鬥家。
是個每天都搭訕女人，到處上床的濫交男。
和美夏見過幾次面，私底下曾多次把她當作夜晚的幻想對象。
他半開玩笑地拜託秋歲「讓我上你女友」，得到了同意，
雖然有些遲疑，但仍憑著一貫的輕浮性格下定決心。

data.short_description: 引導女友和朋友上床的「自主」NTR模擬遊戲！！ 有著扭曲性癖的「秋歲」， 究竟能否讓女友「美夏」沉迷於這種特殊玩法呢？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or later
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Give My Girl a Whirl
data.detailed_description:
▼Real-Time NTR Simulation

Keep your eye on the clock, as time will pass even with you do nothing! The goal is to use on-screen actions or commands to get your girlfriend in the mood for sex.

Commands include telling dirty jokes, getting her drunk, or making her use certain items, etc. Important interactable items will also appear on-screen, so use them at the right moment to influence the situation.

But twiddle your thumbs too long, and it'll be game over before you know it! Minatsu will end up falling asleep or going home!

Get her in the mood before morning comes to watch her fuck your friend!

▼Story

Tonight's the night you're gonna get your girlfriend to have sex with your buddy.

You play as the NTR-obsessed Akitoshi, who desperately wants to see his strait-laced college girlfriend Minatsu—have sex with another man!

Unable to hold back these wretched desires, he confides in his old friend Haruki.

Haruki: "Alright, I get it. So you want me to bang Minatsu, right?"

Akitoshi: "Yeah, that's right."

Haruki: "For real? Like seriously?"

Akitoshi: "I'm always serious."

Haruki: "Damn, dude... You are messed up."

And so, after the three have a nice dinner together, the dastardly duo hatches their scheme to get Akitoshi's girlfriend to join their ménage à trois.

Characters:

Minatsu Nakashio

Akitoshi's girlfriend, a university student.
Met Akitoshi through school (both each other's first romantic parter).
A normal, strait-laced girl.
Flatly refuses to go along with Akitoshi's NTR kink.
Slightly wary of playboys like Haruki.

Akitoshi Momijihara

Minatsu's boyfriend.
Goes to the same university as her.
Is always begging Minatsu to play along with his peculiar kink, but gets shot down no matter how many times he asks.
But unwilling to give up, he confides in his friend Haruki for help.
The two start plotting to change Minatsu's mind.

Haruki Hanazono

Akitoshi's longtime friend, Haruki.
Works part-time at a ramen shop while aiming to become a professional fighter.
A playboy who flirts and fucks around as often as he can.
Having met Minatsu before, he's rubbed one out thinking of her quite a few times.
Jokingly asks Akitoshi to let him bang his girlfriend, but is taken aback when he actually agrees.
Nevertheless, the playboy inside him won't let his chance pass by.

data.short_description: Convince your girlfriend to bang your buddy in this NTR simulator! Will Akitoshi be able to get his girlfriend Minatsu hooked on his peculiar kink?

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-4340 or later
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL support
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
